token.desc: Authentication token bearing required scopes. Tokens should be passed as an HTTP Authorization header or alternatively, as a POST parameter.

app_id.desc: The ID of the app whose icon you want to set.

url.desc: URL of a publicly hosted image

error_bad_format.desc: Icon must be a valid image file.

invalid_icon_size.desc: Icon dimensions must be between 512x512px and 2000x2000px.

invalid_parameters.desc: Only one of `URL` or `file` can be defined.

missing_arguments.desc: One of `URL` or `file` must be provided.

no_permission.desc: User does not have required permissions for app.

error.description: Typical error response if invalid icon size
